patches.value: Memory-forensics framework for analyzing Windows, Linux, and macOS acquisition images with version-matched symbols and reproducible plugin output.

python3 vol.py -f memory.raw windows.pslist.PsList
python3 vol.py -f memory.raw linux.pslist.PsList
分别用匹配操作系统的 PsList 插件枚举内存进程，并保存 PID、父进程、创建时间与退出状态供交叉验证。
Enumerate memory-resident processes with the operating-system-specific PsList plugin and preserve PID, parent, creation time, and exit state for correlation.

python3 vol.py -f memory.raw windows.netstat.NetStat
python3 vol.py -f memory.raw windows.netscan.NetScan
对比 NetStat 与池扫描结果，关联本地/远端地址、端口、状态和所属 PID；孤立结构需要时间线证据确认。
Compare NetStat and pool-scan results by local and remote address, port, state, and owning PID, treating orphaned structures as leads requiring timeline confirmation.

python3 vol.py -f memory.raw windows.dumpfiles.DumpFiles --pid 1234
python3 vol.py -f memory.raw windows.dumpfiles.DumpFiles --virtaddr 0xADDRESS
按实验 PID 或已验证虚拟地址导出缓存文件对象，写入隔离目录并记录原镜像与输出文件哈希。
Dump cached file objects by a lab PID or validated virtual address into an isolated directory while recording source-image and output hashes.
python3 vol.py -f memory.raw windows.malfind.Malfind
定位可疑私有可执行内存与异常权限组合，并结合 VAD、进程映像、反汇编和线程起始地址排除误报。
Locate suspicious private executable memory and unusual permissions, then correlate VADs, process images, disassembly, and thread start addresses to remove false positives.

python3 vol.py -f memory.raw windows.hashdump.Hashdump
python3 vol.py -f memory.raw windows.lsadump.Lsadump
仅对授权的 CTF 或取证镜像解析 SAM/LSA 结构，输出按敏感证据处理并与镜像系统版本和密钥材料匹配。
Parse SAM and LSA structures only from an authorized CTF or forensic image, treating output as sensitive evidence and matching it to image version and key material.

python3 vol.py -f memory.raw windows.cmdline.CmdLine
python3 vol.py -f memory.raw windows.consoles.Consoles
提取进程命令行与控制台缓冲区并按 PID、用户和时间关联；残留文本不一定表示命令实际执行。
Extract process command lines and console buffers and correlate them by PID, user, and time; residual text alone does not prove execution.
python3 vol.py -f memory.raw windows.registry.printkey.PrintKey --key "SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run"
从内存注册表 Hive 读取指定 Run 键，并将值数据与进程、文件哈希和持久化时间线共同核对。
Read the selected Run key from memory-resident registry hives and correlate values with processes, file hashes, and the persistence timeline.
当 RSA 使用小指数且明文幂未绕模时计算精确整数根；只有 iroot 返回 exact 才能把结果解码为明文。
Compute an exact integer root only when RSA uses a small exponent and the plaintext power did not wrap modulo n, decoding output only when iroot reports an exact result.
把 CTF 模数提交给 FactorDB 客户端查询已知分解结果；第三方服务不应接收真实生产密钥材料。
Query known factorizations for a CTF modulus through the FactorDB client without submitting real production key material to a third-party service.
枚举 256 个单字节 XOR 密钥并用题目标识筛选候选；固定示例十六进制可直接运行，实际题目需替换 cipher。
Enumerate all 256 single-byte XOR keys and filter candidates by a challenge marker; the fixed hexadecimal sample runs directly and should be replaced for the actual challenge.

from Crypto.Cipher import AES
key = bytes.fromhex('00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff')
ciphertext = bytes.fromhex('00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff')
cipher = AES.new(key, AES.MODE_ECB)
plaintext = cipher.decrypt(ciphertext)
print(plaintext)
使用明确的 16 字节测试密钥与块对齐密文演示 AES-ECB 原始解密；填充移除和文本解码必须按题目协议另行处理。
Demonstrate raw AES-ECB decryption with an explicit sixteen-byte test key and block-aligned ciphertext, handling padding and text decoding separately according to the challenge protocol.
对一组 CTF PEM 公钥执行批量弱密钥检查，重点识别共享素因子、低指数与可分解模数，并保留逐文件结果。
Run batch weak-key checks across CTF PEM public keys for shared factors, small exponents, and factorable moduli while retaining per-file results.
列出当前安装版本支持的攻击模块名称，先按题目参数选择方法，避免无边界地运行全部模块。
List attack modules supported by the installed version and select methods from challenge parameters instead of running every module without bounds.

tshark -i eth0 -a duration:60 -w capture.pcapng
sudo tcpdump -i any -G 60 -W 1 -w capture.pcap
把实时采集限定为 60 秒并写入新证据文件，开始前确认接口、过滤范围、磁盘空间和抓包授权。
Bound live capture to sixty seconds and write a new evidence file after confirming the interface, capture scope, disk capacity, and authorization.
用 Wireshark 显示过滤器分别筛选 HTTP、DNS 以及 FTP/SSH 流量，保留原始包以便复核过滤结果。
Apply Wireshark display filters for HTTP, DNS, and FTP or SSH traffic while preserving the original packets so filtered results remain reviewable.
tshark -r capture.pcap -q -z follow,tcp,ascii,0
按流编号重组 TCP 负载并以 ASCII 输出；重传、缺包、TLS 加密和错误流编号都会影响可读性。
Reassemble one TCP stream by index and render ASCII payload, accounting for retransmission, packet loss, TLS encryption, and incorrect stream selection.
分别输出 TCP 会话统计与协议层次，快速定位高流量端点和异常协议占比，再回到具体数据包验证。
Report TCP conversations and protocol hierarchy to identify high-volume endpoints and unusual protocol shares before validating them in individual packets.

from scapy.all import ICMP, IP, send
send(IP(dst='127.0.0.1')/ICMP(), count=1, verbose=False)
向本机发送一个自定义 ICMP Echo 包作为权限与协议栈基线；原始套接字通常需要提升权限。
Send one custom ICMP echo packet to localhost as a raw-socket and protocol-stack baseline, noting that raw sockets commonly require elevated privileges.

from scapy.all import ARP, Ether, srp
ans, _ = srp(Ether(dst='ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff')/ARP(pdst='192.168.56.0/24'), timeout=2, verbose=False)
for _, reply in ans:
    print(reply.psrc, reply.hwsrc)
在隔离的 Host-only 子网广播 ARP 请求并打印 IP/MAC 响应；ARP 只覆盖同一二层广播域。
Broadcast ARP requests on an isolated host-only subnet and print responding IP and MAC pairs, recognizing that ARP covers only the local layer-two broadcast domain.
读取 PCAP 并仅输出含 Raw 层的数据，进一步分析前应保留包序号、时间戳和协议上下文。
Read a PCAP and print payloads only from packets containing a Raw layer, retaining packet number, timestamp, and protocol context for subsequent analysis.

from scapy.all import DNS, DNSQR, IP, UDP, sr1
answer = sr1(IP(dst='127.0.0.1')/UDP(dport=53)/DNS(rd=1, qd=DNSQR(qname='lab.example')), timeout=2, verbose=False)
print(answer[DNS].an if answer and DNS in answer else 'NO_RESPONSE')
向本机实验 DNS 服务发送单次 A 查询并显式处理超时；没有响应不等同于名称不存在。
Send one A query to a localhost lab DNS service and handle timeout explicitly, because no response is not equivalent to a nonexistent name.
CTF 网络与协议题分析工具集，覆盖会话统计、HTTP/DNS 字段提取、导出对象和 Scapy 原始负载检查。
CTF network and protocol analysis toolkit covering conversation statistics, HTTP and DNS field extraction, object export, and Scapy raw-payload inspection.
按 TCP 会话、HTTP URI、DNS 查询和可打印字符串建立 PCAP 快速索引，再用帧号回到原始流量确认命中。
Build a rapid PCAP index from TCP conversations, HTTP URIs, DNS queries, and printable strings, then return to frame numbers and original traffic to confirm every hit.
用 Scapy 遍历题目 PCAP 的 Raw 层并输出十六进制，保留包序号和五元组才能可靠还原自定义协议顺序。
Traverse Raw layers in the challenge PCAP with Scapy and print hexadecimal payloads, preserving packet index and five-tuple to reconstruct custom-protocol ordering reliably.
CTF 数字取证工具集，覆盖磁盘分区识别、只读取证、文件雕刻、元数据、日志、内存与网络证据，并强调哈希与时间线关联。
CTF digital-forensics toolkit covering disk partition identification, read-only acquisition, file carving, metadata, logs, memory, and network evidence with hashes and timeline correlation.

file disk.img
mmls disk.img
START_SECTOR=2048
fsstat -o "$START_SECTOR" disk.img
识别镜像格式并用 mmls 获取真实起始扇区，再把经核对的扇区传给 fsstat；不使用未经验证的硬编码挂载偏移。
Identify image format, obtain the actual starting sector with mmls, and pass the reviewed value to fsstat instead of mounting with an unverified hard-coded offset.
让 Foremost、PhotoRec 或 Scalpel 从镜像副本雕刻文件到全新目录，并按签名、偏移和哈希去重验证结果。
Carve files from an image copy into a new directory with Foremost, PhotoRec, or Scalpel and validate results by signature, offset, and hash deduplication.
用 Volatility3 生成系统信息、进程、网络和可疑内存四类基线输出，并通过 PID 与时间戳进行交叉关联。
Generate system, process, network, and suspicious-memory baselines with Volatility3 and correlate the four outputs by PID and timestamp.
CTF 高级取证流程，结合 Volatility3、The Sleuth Kit、TShark、ImageMagick、FFmpeg 与 SoX 做可复现的跨证据分析。
Advanced CTF forensics workflow combining Volatility3, The Sleuth Kit, TShark, ImageMagick, FFmpeg, and SoX for reproducible cross-evidence analysis.

python3 vol.py -f mem.raw windows.info.Info
python3 vol.py -f mem.raw windows.pslist.PsList > procs.txt
python3 vol.py -f mem.raw windows.cmdline.CmdLine > cmds.txt
python3 vol.py -f mem.raw windows.filescan.FileScan | grep -Ei 'flag|secret'
python3 vol.py -f mem.raw -o ./dump windows.dumpfiles.DumpFiles --pid SUSPICIOUS_PID
按系统信息、进程、命令行、文件对象与目标 PID 导出顺序分析内存镜像，并为每个派生文件保留哈希和插件版本。
Analyze the memory image through system, process, command-line, file-object, and target-PID stages while preserving hashes and plugin versions for every derived artifact.
先用 mmls 识别分区，再用 fls 建立路径清单、icat 按 inode 恢复单项、tsk_recover 批量恢复，所有输出写入隔离目录。
Identify partitions with mmls, build a path listing with fls, recover one inode with icat, and perform bulk recovery with tsk_recover into an isolated output directory.
分别导出 SMB 与 HTTP 对象，并使用匹配会话的 TLS key log 解密后过滤 HTTP；缺少密钥时不能宣称载荷已解密。
Export SMB and HTTP objects separately and filter decrypted HTTP only with a matching TLS key log; without keys, payload decryption must not be claimed.
拆分图像通道、按固定帧率提取视频帧、生成音频频谱，并把每个派生文件关联回原始时间戳和哈希。
Separate image channels, extract video at a fixed frame rate, generate an audio spectrogram, and relate every derivative back to source timestamps and hashes.
CTF 椭圆曲线输入验证与格密码分析参考，强调曲线参数、点成员关系、子群阶和可复现的 LLL 基线，而非不完整攻击伪代码。

CTF elliptic-curve input-validation and lattice-analysis reference emphasizing curve parameters, point membership, subgroup order, and reproducible LLL baselines instead of incomplete attack pseudocode.
ECC 输入点验证基线
ECC Input-Point Validation Baseline

from sage.all import EllipticCurve, GF
p, a, b = 9739, 497, 1768
E = EllipticCurve(GF(p), [a, b])
P = E(8045, 6936)
assert P in E and not P.is_zero()
print(P.order())
在固定 CTF 曲线上构造已知点，验证点成员关系、非无穷远点与阶；真实协议还必须检查预期子群和编码规范。
Construct a known point on a fixed CTF curve and verify membership, non-infinity, and order; a real protocol must also enforce the expected subgroup and encoding rules.
LLL 合成格基基线
LLL Synthetic-Lattice Baseline

from sage.all import Matrix, ZZ
M = Matrix(ZZ, [[1, 0, 12345], [0, 1, 67890], [0, 0, 104729]])
reduced = M.LLL()
print(reduced)
对完整可运行的整数合成格执行 LLL 并检查规约基；实际 Coppersmith 或 Hidden Number 建模必须另行推导维度、界和缩放。
Run LLL on a complete reproducible integer lattice and inspect the reduced basis; real Coppersmith or Hidden Number modeling requires separately derived dimensions, bounds, and scaling.

from pwn import remote
connection = remote('127.0.0.1', 1337, timeout=3)
connection.sendline(b'PWN_TEST_MARKER')
print(connection.recvline(timeout=3))
connection.close()
连接本机 CTF 服务，发送固定字节标记并使用有限超时读取一行响应；结束时显式关闭连接。
Connect to a localhost CTF service, send a fixed byte marker, read one response with bounded timeouts, and close the connection explicitly.
启动本地题目进程并在 main 设置 GDB 断点，进入交互前记录二进制哈希、参数和 ASLR 配置。
Start the local challenge process and attach GDB with a breakpoint at main, recording binary hash, arguments, and ASLR configuration before interaction.
从题目 ELF 构造调用 system 的 ROP 链；只有二进制同时提供可解析的 system 与 /bin/sh 字符串时该简化示例才成立。
Build a ROP call to system from the challenge ELF; this simplified example works only when the binary exposes both a resolvable system symbol and a /bin/sh string.
定义题目菜单的分配与释放封装骨架；必须按实际提示符、索引规则和尺寸编码修改，不能把模板直接当作可运行利用。
Define allocation and free wrappers for a menu-challenge skeleton, adapting prompts, index rules, and size encoding instead of treating the template as a runnable exploit.
以安静模式载入本地二进制，或通过 --args 保留目标参数；调试前核对文件哈希与架构。
Load a local binary in quiet mode or preserve target arguments with --args, checking file hash and architecture before debugging.
分别在符号 main 与固定地址设置断点，再运行并继续；固定地址需要与 PIE 基址和当前映射相匹配。
Set breakpoints at symbolic main and at a fixed address before running and continuing, adjusting fixed addresses for PIE base and current mappings.
同时查看通用寄存器、原始栈槽和 Pwndbg telescope 解析结果，用映射权限确认指针解释。
Compare general registers, raw stack slots, and Pwndbg telescope output, validating interpreted pointers against memory mappings and permissions.
用原生 GDB、Pwndbg 或 GEF 反汇编函数和当前指令区域；插件命令只在对应插件已加载时可用。
Disassemble functions and the current instruction region with native GDB, Pwndbg, or GEF commands, using plugin commands only when the matching plugin is loaded.
用 Ropper 与 ROPgadget 搜索题目文件中的候选序列，并按架构、坏字符、栈效果和可执行映射进一步筛选。
Search challenge files for candidate sequences with Ropper and ROPgadget, then filter by architecture, bad bytes, stack effects, and executable mappings.
使用插件或原生 find 在指定映射中搜索字符串与字节序列，并记录实际命中地址及其读写执行权限。
Search selected mappings for strings or byte sequences with plugin and native commands, recording hit addresses and their read, write, and execute permissions.
二进制漏洞开发辅助工具集，覆盖保护机制识别、ROP gadget 搜索、libc 偏移与约束检查，要求与题目架构和库版本匹配。
Binary exploit-development helper toolkit covering mitigation inspection, ROP gadget search, libc offsets, and constraint checks matched to the challenge architecture and library version.

checksec --file=./binary
python3 -c "from pwn import ELF; elf=ELF('./binary'); print(elf.checksec())"
用独立 checksec 与 Pwntools 两种路径核对 PIE、NX、RELRO、栈保护和 Fortify，并调查结果差异。
Compare PIE, NX, RELRO, stack canaries, and Fortify through standalone checksec and Pwntools, investigating any difference between reports.
分别搜索题目 ELF 与匹配 libc 的 ROP 序列和字符串，按架构、地址坏字符与调用约定筛选。
Search the challenge ELF and matching libc for ROP sequences and strings, filtering results by architecture, bad address bytes, and calling convention.
浏览器 Fetch 实验请求
Browser Fetch Lab Request

fetch('/api/status', {headers: {'X-CTF-Lab': 'PWN_TEST_MARKER'}})
  .then(response => response.text())
  .then(console.log)
在题目同源页面控制台发送只读状态请求与固定实验头，观察浏览器凭据、CORS 和响应处理边界。
Send a read-only same-origin status request with a fixed lab header from the browser console and observe credential, CORS, and response-handling boundaries.

php -r "var_dump(PHP_VERSION, '0e123' == '0e456');"
php -r "var_dump(PHP_VERSION, 0 == 'admin');"
php -r "echo md5('240610708'), PHP_EOL;"
在当前 PHP 版本直接比较 magic-hash 与数值/字符串弱比较结果；PHP 8 已改变部分字符串到数字比较，不能沿用旧版结论。
Measure magic-hash and numeric-to-string loose comparisons on the installed PHP version, because PHP 8 changed behavior that older challenge writeups often assume.
对本机 CTF 服务执行长度和字符集均有界的布尔对照，使用固定真值标记判定；超时、错误页和缓存命中必须单独处理。
Run a length- and alphabet-bounded Boolean comparison against a localhost CTF service using a fixed true marker, handling timeout, error pages, and cache hits separately.
用 ZBar 或 Pyzbar 解码本地 QR 图像并保留原始字节；损坏图形应先在副本上修复定位和时序图案。
Decode a local QR image with ZBar or Pyzbar while preserving raw bytes, repairing finder and timing patterns only on a copy when the symbol is damaged.
生成音频频谱、检测 DTMF 并读取采样参数；摩斯或其他编码必须从时间与频率证据判断，不能仅凭听感。
Generate an audio spectrogram, detect DTMF, and inspect sample parameters, deriving Morse or other encodings from timing and frequency evidence rather than listening alone.
使用 StegSolve 与 Python 提取 RGB 像素最低位，并按八位分组检查前 20 字节；通道、遍历顺序和位序需逐项验证。
Extract RGB least-significant bits with StegSolve and Python and inspect the first twenty bytes, testing channel, traversal order, and bit order independently.

fcrackzip -v -u -D -p rockyou.txt archive.zip
zip2john archive.zip > archive.hash
john --wordlist=rockyou.txt archive.hash
7z x archive.7z -ppassword
仅对 CTF 压缩包使用字典候选，先把 ZIP 转为 John 哈希文件；7-Zip 的 -p 参数与密码之间不能插入空格。
Use dictionary candidates only on a CTF archive, converting ZIP metadata to a John hash file first; 7-Zip requires the password directly after its -p option.

exiftool image.jpg
exiftool -Comment image.jpg
exiftool -o image-with-comment.jpg -Comment='CTF_TEST_MARKER' image.jpg
读取全部或 Comment 元数据，并用 -o 写出新的实验副本；不在取证原件上清除或覆盖 EXIF。
Read all metadata or the Comment field and write a new lab copy with -o, never clearing or overwriting EXIF on the forensic original.
CTF PWN 技术参考，按二进制保护、架构、libc 版本和分配器实现组织栈、格式化字符串、堆与 ROP 分析路径。
CTF PWN technique reference organized by binary mitigations, architecture, libc version, and allocator implementation across stack, format-string, heap, and ROP analysis.

git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/shellphish/how2heap.git
cd how2heap
find . -maxdepth 2 -type f -iname '*tcache*' -print | sort
获取 How2heap 并按文件名列出 tcache 示例，再根据目标 glibc 版本选择对应源码；不把跨版本伪代码当作可运行模板。
Clone How2heap and list tcache examples by filename before selecting source for the target glibc version instead of treating cross-version pseudocode as runnable.
Linux CTF 工作台速查，覆盖二进制识别、可复现编解码、受控网络通道和带偏移证据的数据提取。
Linux CTF workstation reference covering binary identification, reproducible decoding, controlled network channels, and evidence-aware data extraction.
依次检查文件类型、保护机制、ELF 头、动态依赖、前段反汇编和调试入口，保存工具版本与文件哈希。
Inspect file type, mitigations, ELF headers, dynamic dependencies, initial disassembly, and debugger entry while preserving tool versions and file hashes.

echo 'dGVzdA==' | base64 -d
echo '68656c6c6f' | xxd -r -p
printf '%b' '\x68\x65\x6c\x6c\x6f'
python3 -c "print(bytes.fromhex('48656c6c6f').decode('utf-8'))"
分别解码 Base64、连续十六进制和转义字节，并显式使用 UTF-8 将 Python 字节转换为文本。
Decode Base64, contiguous hexadecimal, and escaped bytes separately, using an explicit UTF-8 conversion for Python byte output.
在隔离网络建立 Netcat、Socat 或 Pwncat 通道；确认端口占用与工具变体后再选择监听、传输或 Shell 桥接模式。
Create Netcat, Socat, or Pwncat channels on an isolated network after confirming port availability and tool variant, then select listener, transfer, or shell-bridge mode intentionally.

strings -a -t x file | grep -E 'flag\{|CTF\{|picoCTF\{'
xxd file | grep -i 'flag'
binwalk -e file
find . -type f -iname 'flag*' -print
保留字符串十六进制偏移并对十六进制视图、Binwalk 输出和文件名结果交叉验证，避免把单一文本命中当作最终 Flag。
Preserve hexadecimal string offsets and cross-check hex view, Binwalk output, and filenames rather than treating one text hit as the final flag.
CTF Web 高级技术参考，聚焦可验证的 SVG XML 实体解析与 Jinja2 模板上下文边界，并去除不完整归档步骤和脆弱类索引。
Advanced CTF web reference focused on verifiable SVG XML entity parsing and Jinja2 template-context boundaries, with incomplete archive steps and brittle subclass indexes removed.
SVG 外部实体解析基线
SVG External-Entity Parsing Baseline

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<!DOCTYPE svg [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/hostname">]>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <text>&xxe;</text>
</svg>
使用根元素与 DOCTYPE 一致的完整 SVG 文档检查本地实体解析；上传成功或文件名回显不等于实体已展开。
Use a complete SVG document whose root matches its DOCTYPE to test local entity resolution; upload success or filename reflection does not prove expansion.
